pi_items.source: Task description (15 minutes per slot) and Canvas LMS appointment group configuration supports duration_minutes in minutes. Verified via Canvas documentation (https://help.ithaca.edu/TDClient/34/Portal/KB/ArticleDet?ID=1662)

Task description (Limit each time slot to 1 user) and Canvas appointment groups support participants_per_appointment parameter. Verified via Canvas API documentation (https://canvas.instructure.com/doc/api/appointment_groups.html)

Task description and setup_task.sh creates course with code 'SPAN101' and name 'Elementary Spanish I'. SPAN101 is a widely recognized course code across US universities for Elementary Spanish I (verified via https://spanish.gmu.edu/courses/span101/course_sections/100229)

privileged_info_summary: The task creates an appointment group (scheduler event) in Canvas LMS for a course SPAN101 (Elementary Spanish I). The appointment group has the title 'Oral Proficiency Exams', location 'Language Lab 101', duration of 15 minutes per time slot, and a limit of 1 participant per slot. Canvas LMS is a real, open-source learning management system used widely in higher education. The appointment group scheduler is a standard Canvas feature for creating student sign-up slots. All metadata values are consistent with the task description and Canvas LMS configuration options. The test data (Canvas instance, course, seed data) is synthetic, running in a Docker container.
